description: User-provided store photos paired with visible price-tag photos. The target price is the pre-multiplier reference listing/tag price.
pairingRule: Pairs were matched by adjacent original filename order and corrected by visual item/tag consistency.

entries.itemNameFromTag: Burberry TB Monogram Robin Crossbody Bag
entries.notes: Clean pair. The tag is attached to the same Burberry TB monogram bag.

entries.itemNameFromTag: MCM Klassik Visetos Mix Small Crossbody in White and Brown
entries.notes: Clean pair. Filename upload order was misleading; visual match is IMG_7492 with IMG_7493.

entries.itemNameFromTag: Chanel black drawstring bucket bag with bamboo handle
entries.notes: Price is handwritten on tag. Product photo has another bag in the background; target is the foreground black drawstring/bamboo-handle bag.

entries.itemNameFromTag: Prada Logo Jacquard Canvas and Leather Shoulder Bag
entries.notes: Product photo includes two Prada bags. Target is the foreground beige/brown shoulder bag on the left.

entries.itemNameFromTag: Fendi Dark Green Baguette Teal Blue FF Logo Hardware Shoulder Bag
Givenchy Olivia Green Shearling Mini Cut Out Bag
Gucci GG Monogram Beige with Black Trim Wool Pouch
entries.notes: Product photo includes multiple visible Gucci items. Target is the foreground beige/black GG wool pouch.
